## Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and complete
- [ ] All front matter fields are filled in correctly
- [ ] Links (PDF, DOI, arXiv, code, etc.) are verified and working
- [ ] Images (if any) are added to `static/images/` and referenced correctly
- [ ] No private, unpublished, or sensitive material is included
- [ ] The PR title follows the naming convention (e.g., `add-paper-icse-2025`, `add-profile-jane-doe`)
